user.title: Vyloz Smeti FCC SK
user.description: Pick the municipality whose waste collection schedule you want to track. The list is fetched from the FCC Vyloz Smeti public API.

data_description.location_id: City or town. If multiple municipalities share the same name, the FCC code is shown in parentheses.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach the FCC Vyloz Smeti API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.no_locations: The FCC Vyloz Smeti API returned no municipalities.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Vyloz Smeti options
init.description: Adjust how often Home Assistant refreshes the schedule.

data_description.update_interval: How often the schedule is refreshed from the API. Allowed range: 1-24 hours.

cannot_connect.message: Failed to reach the FCC Vyloz Smeti API.
